CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_content_en', false, 'NT279Vrs2ZjQp2RPNDM_KLU7i_E1LVJHrLdqU-crWHU', 'v3.5.0--hCiJgNq6eKxfmeTXnQ9fkMz6AF2_xn-uepb-XokaFq0', 'lUXl6wokSPW2qVX7iil0mFq69xuEAi3GP-ptIzHwuNE'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_content_en; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_content_en (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "head" TEXT NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "ogImage" TEXT NULL, "path" VARCHAR, "robots" TEXT NULL, "schemaOrg" TEXT NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "sitemap" TEXT NULL, "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_articles_en VALUES ('articles_en/en/articles/5-amazing-raycast-nuxt-snippets.md', '5 Amazing Raycast Snippets for Enhancing Your Nuxt (Vue) Projects', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},["img",{"alt":"preview","src":"/articles/5-raycast-snippets.jpg"}]],["p",{},"In the realm of web development, where efficiency is as valuable as expertise, tools that streamline and simplify our workflow are indispensable. Among these, Raycast snippets emerge as a powerful ally, especially for those working with Nuxt and Vue frameworks. But what exactly are these snippets, and how can they transform your development experience?"],["h2",{"id":"what-are-raycast-snippets"},"What Are Raycast Snippets?"],["p",{},"Raycast snippets are small, reusable pieces of text or code that can be quickly inserted into your work. Think of them as shortcuts for frequently used content - whether it''s code, canned email responses, or even emojis. They are designed to save time and reduce repetitive typing, allowing developers and writers to work more efficiently."],["h2",{"id":"how-to-use-raycast-snippets"},"How to Use Raycast Snippets"],["p",{},"Using Raycast snippets is straightforward. Once you''ve created or imported a snippet within the Raycast app, you can assign a specific keyword to it. This keyword acts as a trigger - whenever you type it in any application, the snippet will automatically expand in place, replacing the keyword with the full text or code of the snippet."],["p",{},"For instance, if you have a snippet for a standard email sign-off, you can assign a keyword like ",["code",{},"sig1"],". Typing ",["code",{},"sig1"]," in an email will then automatically expand to the full signature text. This feature is especially useful in coding, where you can have snippets for common code patterns or configurations."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"snippets-exemple","src":"/articles/snippets-exemple.gif"}]],["h3",{"id":"component-template-comp"},"Component Template: ",["code",{},"!comp"]],["p",{},"The ",["code",{},"!comp"]," snippet is a basic yet powerful template for creating new Vue components. It includes a script setup with TypeScript support, a template section, and scoped styling. This snippet is ideal for rapidly scaffolding new components in your project."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Usage Example:"]," Use ",["code",{},"!comp"]," to quickly create new Vue components, ensuring consistency and saving time on setup."],["pre",{"className":"language-vue shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport type { PropType } from </"],["span",{"class":"sByVh"},"div"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"</"],["span",{"class":"sByVh"},"template"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":17},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":18},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"<"],["span",{"class":"sByVh"},"style"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," Handler Template: ",["code",{},"!api"]],["p",{},"Handling API requests is a common task in modern web applications. The ",["code",{},"!api"]," snippet provides a template for creating API handlers using ",["code",{},"h3"],", a lightweight HTTP toolkit. This snippet streamlines the process of setting up API routes and handling requests."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Usage Example:"]," Implement the ",["code",{},"!api"]," snippet for creating efficient API routes in your Nuxt application, especially when dealing with CRUD operations."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"import { H3Event } from \"h3\";\n\nexport default defineEventHandler(async (event: H3Event) => {\n  const body = await readBody(event);\n  // your_api_logic\n});\n","filename":"~/server/api/MyHandler.ts","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"import"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," { H3Event } "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"from"],["span",{"class":"sfrk1"}," \"h3\""],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"export"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," default"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," defineEventHandler"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"("],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"async"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," ("],["span",{"class":"sQHwn"},"event"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},":"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," H3Event"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},") "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"=>"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"  const"],["span",{"class":"suiK_"}," body"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," ="],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," await"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," readBody"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"(event);\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sCsY4"},"  // your_api_logic\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"});\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"state-management-with-pinia-store"},"State Management with Pinia: ",["code",{},"!store"]],["p",{},"State management is crucial in large-scale applications. The ",["code",{},"!store"]," snippet utilizes Pinia, a Vue store, offering a structured template for managing application state. It includes a state definition, getters, and actions."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Usage Example:"]," Utilize ",["code",{},"!store"]," for setting up store modules in your Nuxt/Vue app, managing state more effectively and cleanly. the { clipboard } while be replaced by your actual clipboard."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"import { defineStore } from ''pinia'';\n\ntype {clipboard}Store = { \n  count: number;\n} \n\nexport const use{clipboard}Store = defineStore(''{clipboard}'', {\n  state: (): {clipboard}Store => ({ \n    count: 0,\n  }), \n  getters: { \n    getCount(): number { \n      return this.count; \n    }\n  },\n  actions: { \n    increment() {\n      this.count++; \n    }, \n  } \n});\n","filename":"~/store/{clipboard}.ts","highlights":[0],"language":"ts","meta":"[~/store/.ts]","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"import"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," ''pinia''"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"type {clipboard}Store "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"="],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," { \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  count: number;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"} \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"export"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," const"],["span",{"class":"suiK_"}," use"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"{clipboard}Store "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"="],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," defineStore"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"("],["span",{"class":"sfrk1"},"''{clipboard}''"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},", {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"shcOC"},"  state"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},": ()"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},":"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sQHwn"},"clipboard"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"}"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"},"Store"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," =>"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," ({ \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"    count: "],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"0"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  }), \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  getters: { \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"shcOC"},"    getCount"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"()"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},":"],["span",{"class":"suiK_"}," number"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," { \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"      return"],["span",{"class":"suiK_"}," this"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},".count; \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"    }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":15},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  actions: { \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":17},["span",{"class":"shcOC"},"    increment"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"() {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":18},["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"      this"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},".count"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"++"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"; \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":19},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"    }, \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":20},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  } \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":21},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"});\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"composable-function-template-cps"},"Composable Function Template: ",["code",{},"!cps"]],["p",{},"Composable functions in Vue 3 bring reusability and organization to your code. The ",["code",{},"!cps"]," snippet offers a template for creating these functions, aiding in maintaining a clean and modular codebase."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Usage Example:"]," Use ",["code",{},"!cps"]," for creating reusable composable functions that can be shared across components, enhancing code reusability and maintainability."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"export function use{clipboard}() {\n  const {clipboard} = ref(null);\n  \n  // Composable logic\n  \n  return { {clipboard} };\n}\n","filename":"~/composables/useComposables.ts","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"export"],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"}," function"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," use"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"{clipboard}() {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"  const"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," {"],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"clipboard"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"} "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"="],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"("],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"null"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sCsY4"},"  // Composable logic\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"  \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"  return"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," { {clipboard} };\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"}\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"fetching-data-with-composition-api-fcomp"},"Fetching Data with Composition API: ",["code",{},"!fcomp"]],["p",{},"The ",["code",{},"!fcomp"]," snippet is designed for fetching data using Vue''s Composition API. It provides a setup for making HTTP requests, handling loading states, and managing errors, all within a component."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Usage Example:"]," Implement ",["code",{},"!fcomp"]," in scenarios where you need to fetch data from an API, providing a robust structure for data fetching and state management."],["pre",{"className":"language-vue shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nconst { data, pending, error, refresh } = useFetch(\"your_url\", { \n  immediate: false,\n  watch: false,\n});\n\nfunction loadData() {\n  await refresh();\n}\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <div>\n    <button @click=\"loadData\">Load Data</button>\n    <div v-if=\"pending\">Loading...</div>\n    <div v-if=\"error\">{{ error }}</div>\n    <div v-if=\"data\">{{ data }}</div>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<style scoped>\n/* composant styles */\n</style>\n","filename":"MyComponent.vue","language":"vue","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"slsVL"},"<"],["span",{"class":"sByVh"},"script"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," setup"],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," { "],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"data"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},", "],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"pending"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},", "],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"error"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"},", "],["span",{"class":"suiK_"},"refresh"],["span",{"class":"slsVL"}," } "],["span",{"class":"so5gQ"},"="],["span",{"class":"shcOC"}," aspects of your project."],["h4",{"id":"maintain-consistency"},"Maintain Consistency"],["p",{},"Using standardized snippets ensures consistency across your codebase, making it easier to read, likelihood of errors or oversights."],["h4",{"id":"foster-learning"},"Foster Learning"],["p",{},"For new developers or those new to Nuxt and Vue, these snippets offer insight into best practices and One of the most prevalent of these dilemmas lies in the delicate balance between striving for perfection and the need to launch quickly. Explore with me the nuances of these contradictory perspectives."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"preview","src":"/articles/launch-your-porfolio.jpg"}]],["h3",{"id":"the-aspiration-to-perfection-an-unattainable-ideal"},"The aspiration to perfection: an unattainable ideal?"],["p",{},"The traditional vision of artistic creation encourages us to pursue perfection from the outset. Every line of code, every element of design should converge towards absolute excellence. However, this dream of perfection can sometimes become a burden, a brake on progress. The relentless quest for perfection can paralyze the creative process, turning creation into an endless pursuit."],["h3",{"id":"the-perfectionism-trap-when-the-best-becomes-the-enemy-of-the-good"},"The Perfectionism Trap: when the best becomes the enemy of the good"],["p",{},"Perfectionism can turn into a subtle trap. Waiting for every detail to be impeccable can delay your portfolio indefinitely. This prolonged stalling can have implications for professional credibility, as the market often demands a fast, dynamic online presence."],["h3",{"id":"the-bold-proposal-to-launch-quickly-iterate-rather-than-perfect"},"The bold proposal to launch quickly: iterate rather than perfect"],["p",{},"The idea of launching quickly, even if the portfolio doesn''t reach an immediate level of perfection, offers an alternative perspective. It''s about recognizing that each iteration can be an improvement on the previous one. This approach encourages a constant iteration mentality, where each version becomes a learning opportunity."],["h3",{"id":"speed-as-a-means-of-learning-create-by-doing"},"Speed as a means of learning: create by doing"],["p",{},"Launching quickly thus becomes a means of learning. Speed doesn''t mean compromising on quality, but rather accepting that perfection may initially be unattainable. It''s an invitation to learn by doing, to use each version of the portfolio as a testing ground."],["h3",{"id":"the-crucial-importance-of-time-time-efficiency-and-judicious-management"},"The crucial importance of time: time efficiency and judicious management"],["p",{},"Time plays a crucial role in this debate. Time efficiency, underlined by the perspective of speed, becomes an essential skill. Judicious time management is the key to maintaining momentum without compromising quality. Consciously choosing where to invest one''s time becomes a strategic act."],["h3",{"id":"total-control-vs-flexibility-navigating-between-the-two-extremes"},"Total control vs. flexibility: navigating between the two extremes"],["p",{},"Total control of the creative process offers a sense of autonomy and empowerment. However, it is vital not to confuse control with rigidity. Being open to market developments and new trends is just as essential as personal control. It''s a delicate balance between autonomy and adaptability."],["h3",{"id":"the-delicate-balance-a-continuous-journey-of-discovery-and-adaptation"},"The delicate balance: a continuous journey of discovery and adaptation"],["p",{},"Ultimately, portfolio creation is an ongoing journey. It''s navigating this paradox with intention. It''s finding a balance between the quest for excellence and the need to move quickly, knowing that each iteration is a progression towards an improved version of yourself. To create a portfolio is to embrace the paradox, to consciously choose between perfection and speed, and to accept that the path to excellence is a journey rather than a destination."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"introduction","depth":2,"text":"Introduction","children":[{"id":"the-aspiration-to-perfection-an-unattainable-ideal","depth":3,"text":"The aspiration to perfection: an unattainable ideal?"},{"id":"the-perfectionism-trap-when-the-best-becomes-the-enemy-of-the-good","depth":3,"text":"The Perfectionism Trap: when the best becomes the enemy of the good"},{"id":"the-bold-proposal-to-launch-quickly-iterate-rather-than-perfect","depth":3,"text":"The bold proposal to launch quickly: iterate rather than perfect"},{"id":"speed-as-a-means-of-learning-create-by-doing","depth":3,"text":"Speed as a means of learning: create by doing"},{"id":"the-crucial-importance-of-time-time-efficiency-and-judicious-management","depth":3,"text":"The crucial importance of time: time efficiency and judicious management"},{"id":"total-control-vs-flexibility-navigating-between-the-two-extremes","depth":3,"text":"Total control vs. flexibility: navigating between the two extremes"},{"id":"the-delicate-balance-a-continuous-journey-of-discovery-and-adaptation","depth":3,"text":"The delicate balance: a continuous journey of discovery and adaptation"}]}]}}', '20/10/2023', 'Aiming for perfectionism is a very good state of mind. INSERT INTO _content_articles_en VALUES ('articles_en/en/articles/not-an-impostor.md', 'You are not an impostor', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},["img",{"alt":"preview","src":"/articles/trap-of-perfection.jpg"}]],["p",{},"In the theater of content creation, there are many who, backstage, whisper a phrase tinged with doubt: \"I''m not legitimate, others are so much better\". This melody of insecurity, often played over and over in the minds of emerging creators, is the first act of a much larger work: the conquest of one''s own legitimacy."],["p",{},"Imagine yourself standing at the edge of the stage, dazzled by the spotlight of self-judgment. Every creator goes through this. But instead of sinking into the shadows of self-deprecation, take a moment to listen to the whispers of the audience: the other creators. What you hear is not a cacophony of criticism, but a chorus of experiences and lessons."],["p",{},"This is where the magic happens. Instead of seeing the stage as a place for competition, turn it into a space for learning. Let other people''s successes inspire you, their mistakes teach you. This is not imitation, but a creative harmony where you can find your own rhythm, your own melody."],["p",{},"Your authenticity is your most precious instrument. Play it with confidence. Every note of your experience, your perspective, resonates in a unique way with your audience. Authenticity is a creator''s true opus, far more captivating than the exhausting quest for perfection."],["p",{},"Remember, every creation is a rehearsal for the next. There''s no grand finale where everything has to be perfect. It''s a continuous concert, where each performance is better than the last."],["p",{},"And in this showroom, you''re not alone. Backstage, you''ll find plenty of mentors, peers and admirers. They''re there to encourage you, to guide you, to applaud your successes and support you in your doubts. This community is your chorus of support, turning fearful solos into courageous duets."],["p",{},"In the end, every curtain raised, every light turned on, is a step closer to accepting your own talent. The feeling of imposture dissipates not when you compare yourself to others, but when you recognize the unique beauty of your own performance. In this room, success is measured not just by the applause at the end, but by the courage to get up on stage and say: \"Here''s my story, listen to it\"."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[]}}', '11/01/2024', 'In the theater of content creation, many backstage whisper a phrase tinged with doubt: ''I m not legitimate, others are so much better.'' CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_articles_fr', false, '3Ejpx_cPW7zD3CSpAnb6U60BJECHfbKk65Z-MTWpe98', 'v3.5.0--7KJitVVwR0KoH3ErWFwBw21vjxiquKjZPWxDQqkWx2A', 'SUqj8v9VY3JguauynY-bthUWKOQjCnCucP_rbfYy5as'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_articles_fr; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_articles_fr (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "head" TEXT NULL, "image" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "ogImage" TEXT NULL, "path" VARCHAR, "readingTime" VARCHAR, "robots" TEXT NULL, "schemaOrg" TEXT NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "sitemap" TEXT NULL, "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_articles_fr VALUES ('articles_fr/fr/articles/launch-your-portfolio.md', 'Fini ton portfolio !', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"introduction"},"Introduction"],["p",{},"La création d''un portfolio en tant que professionnel du développement, du design ou de la tech est un voyage ponctué de choix complexes. L''un de ces dilemmes les plus prégnants réside dans le délicat équilibre entre l''aspiration à la perfection et la nécessité de lancer rapidement. Explorez avec moi les nuances de ces perspectives contradictoires."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"preview","src":"/articles/launch-your-porfolio.jpg"}]],["h3",{"id":"laspiration-à-la-perfection-un-idéal-inatteignable"},"L''aspiration à la perfection : un idéal inatteignable ?"],["p",{},"La vision traditionnelle de la création artistique nous incite à poursuivre la perfection dès le départ. Chaque ligne de code, chaque élément de design devrait converger vers l''excellence absolue. Cependant, ce rêve de perfection peut parfois devenir un fardeau, un frein au progrès. La quête incessante de la perfection peut paralyser le processus créatif, transformant la création en une poursuite infinie."],["h3",{"id":"le-piège-du-perfectionnisme-quand-le-mieux-devient-lennemi-du-bien"},"Le Piège du perfectionnisme : quand le mieux devient l''ennemi du bien"],["p",{},"Le perfectionnisme peut se transformer en un piège subtil. Attendre que chaque détail soit impeccable peut retarder indéfiniment la mise en ligne du portfolio. Ce piétinement prolongé peut avoir des implications sur la crédibilité professionnelle, car le marché exige souvent une présence en ligne rapide et dynamique."],["h3",{"id":"la-proposition-audacieuse-de-lancer-rapidement-itérer-plutôt-que-parfaire"},"La proposition audacieuse de lancer rapidement : itérer plutôt que parfaire"],["p",{},"L''idée de lancer rapidement, même si le portfolio n''atteint pas un niveau de perfection immédiat, offre une perspective alternative. Il s''agit de reconnaître que chaque itération peut être une amélioration par rapport à la précédente. Cette approche encourage une mentalité d''itération constante, où chaque version devient une opportunité d''apprentissage."],["h3",{"id":"rapidité-comme-moyen-dapprentissage-créer-en-faisant"},"Rapidité comme moyen d''apprentissage : créer en faisant"],["p",{},"Lancer rapidement devient ainsi un moyen d''apprentissage. La rapidité n''est pas synonyme de compromis sur la qualité, mais plutôt d''une acceptation que la perfection peut être inatteignable initialement. C''est une invitation à apprendre en faisant, à utiliser chaque version du portfolio comme un terrain d''expérimentation."],["h3",{"id":"limportance-cruciale-du-temps-efficacité-temporelle-et-gestion-judicieuse"},"L''importance cruciale du temps : efficacité temporelle et gestion judicieuse"],["p",{},"Le temps joue un rôle crucial dans ce débat. L''efficacité temporelle, soulignée par la perspective de la rapidité, devient une compétence essentielle. La gestion judicieuse du temps est la clé pour maintenir l''élan sans compromettre la qualité. Choisir consciemment où investir son temps devient un acte stratégique."],["h3",{"id":"contrôle-total-vs-flexibilité-naviguer-entre-les-deux-extrêmes"},"Contrôle total vs. flexibilité : naviguer entre les deux extrêmes"],["p",{},"Contrôler entièrement le processus de création offre un sentiment d''autonomie et d''empowerment. Cependant, il est vital de ne pas confondre contrôle avec rigidité. Être ouvert aux évolutions du marché et aux nouvelles tendances est tout aussi essentiel que le contrôle personnel. C''est un équilibre délicat entre autonomie et adaptabilité."],["h3",{"id":"léquilibre-délicat-un-voyage-continu-de-découverte-et-dadaptation"},"L''équilibre délicat : un voyage continu de découverte et d''adaptation"],["p",{},"En fin de compte, la création du portfolio est un voyage continu. C''est naviguer dans ce paradoxe avec intention. C''est trouver un équilibre entre la quête de l''excellence et la nécessité d''agir rapidement, sachant que chaque itération est une progression vers une version améliorée de soi-même. Créer un portfolio, c''est embrasser le paradoxe, c''est choisir consciemment entre perfection et rapidité, et c''est accepter que le chemin vers l''excellence est un voyage plutôt qu''une destination."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"introduction","depth":2,"text":"Introduction","children":[{"id":"laspiration-à-la-perfection-un-idéal-inatteignable","depth":3,"text":"L''aspiration à la perfection : un idéal inatteignable ?"},{"id":"le-piège-du-perfectionnisme-quand-le-mieux-devient-lennemi-du-bien","depth":3,"text":"Le Piège du perfectionnisme : quand le mieux devient l''ennemi du bien"},{"id":"la-proposition-audacieuse-de-lancer-rapidement-itérer-plutôt-que-parfaire","depth":3,"text":"La proposition audacieuse de lancer rapidement : itérer plutôt que parfaire"},{"id":"rapidité-comme-moyen-dapprentissage-créer-en-faisant","depth":3,"text":"Rapidité comme moyen d''apprentissage : créer en faisant"},{"id":"limportance-cruciale-du-temps-efficacité-temporelle-et-gestion-judicieuse","depth":3,"text":"L''importance cruciale du temps : efficacité temporelle et gestion judicieuse"},{"id":"contrôle-total-vs-flexibilité-naviguer-entre-les-deux-extrêmes","depth":3,"text":"Contrôle total vs. flexibilité : naviguer entre les deux extrêmes"},{"id":"léquilibre-délicat-un-voyage-continu-de-découverte-et-dadaptation","depth":3,"text":"L''équilibre délicat : un voyage continu de découverte et d''adaptation"}]}]}}', '20/10/2023', 'Viser le perfectionnisme est un très bon état d''esprit. D''un autre côté, travailler jusqu''à ce que le perfectionnisme soit à 100 % peut aussi être mauvais. INSERT INTO _content_articles_fr VALUES ('articles_fr/fr/articles/not-an-impostor.md', 'Tu n''es pas un imposteur', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},["img",{"alt":"preview","src":"/articles/trap-of-perfection.jpg"}]],["p",{},"Dans le théâtre de la création de contenu, nombreux sont ceux qui, en coulisses, murmurent une phrase teintée de doute : \"Je ne suis pas légitime, les autres sont tellement meilleurs\". Cette mélodie d''insécurité, souvent jouée en boucle dans l''esprit des créateurs émergents, est le premier acte d''une œuvre bien plus vaste : la conquête de sa propre légitimité."],["p",{},"Imaginez-vous debout, au bord de la scène, ébloui par les projecteurs de l''auto-jugement. Chaque créateur passe par là. Mais au lieu de vous enfoncer dans l''ombre de l''autodénigrement, prenez un moment pour écouter les murmures du public : les autres créateurs. Ce que vous entendez n''est pas une cacophonie de critiques, mais un chœur d''expériences et de leçons."],["p",{},"C''est ici que la magie opère. Au lieu de voir la scène comme un lieu de compétition, transformez-la en un espace d''apprentissage. Laissez les succès des autres vous inspirer, leurs erreurs vous enseigner. Ce n''est pas de l''imitation, mais une harmonie créative où vous pouvez trouver votre propre rythme, votre propre mélodie."],["p",{},"Votre authenticité est votre instrument le plus précieux. Jouez-la avec confiance. Chaque note de votre expérience, de votre perspective, résonne d''une façon unique auprès de votre public. L''authenticité est le véritable opus d''un créateur, bien plus captivant que la quête épuisante de la perfection."],["p",{},"N''oubliez pas, chaque création est une répétition pour la suivante. Il n''y a pas de final grandiose où tout doit être parfait. C''est un concert en continu, où chaque performance est meilleure que la précédente."],["p",{},"Et dans cette salle de spectacle, vous n''êtes pas seul. Les coulisses regorgent de mentors, de pairs, d''admirateurs. Ils sont là pour vous encourager, pour vous guider, pour applaudir vos réussites et vous soutenir dans vos doutes. Cette communauté est votre chœur de soutien, transformant les solos de peur en duos de courage."],["p",{},"En fin de compte, chaque rideau levé, chaque lumière allumée est un pas de plus vers l''acceptation de votre propre talent. Le sentiment d''imposture se dissipe non pas quand on se compare aux autres, mais quand on reconnaît la beauté unique de sa propre performance. Dans cette salle, le succès n''est pas seulement mesuré par l''applaudissement à la fin, mais par le courage de monter sur scène et de dire : \"Voici mon histoire, écoutez-la\"."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[]}}', '11/01/2024', 'Dans le théâtre de la création de contenu, nombreux sont ceux qui, en coulisses, murmurent une phrase teintée de doute : ''Je ne suis pas légitime, les autres sont tellement meilleurs''. Cette mélodie d''insécurité, souvent jouée en boucle dans l''esprit des créateurs émergents, est le premier acte d''une œuvre bien plus vaste : la conquête de sa propre légitimité.', 'md', NULL, 'https://canvas.hrcd.fr/articles/trap-of-perfection.jpg', '{}', 'true', NULL, '/fr/articles/not-an-impostor', '3', NULL, NULL, '{"title":"Tu n''es pas un imposteur","description":"Dans le théâtre de la création de contenu, nombreux sont ceux qui, en coulisses, murmurent une phrase teintée de doute : ''Je ne suis pas légitime, les autres sont tellement meilleurs''. INSERT INTO _content_stack VALUES ('stack/stack.json', 'json', UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_stack'; -- meta
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_faq_en', false, 'YmsNdgBD4YTRWuslo4ig6jZJmF42kHbFvdBWSzZVPRw', 'v3.5.0--TgEwNOJM13trv2x9dkFz3-OxC1EgJ1X512r6gxbteeU', '2f3M_ON7nUnG3tYThrxvpGWBIMsXmN_NK03uw5Dzv0U'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_faq_en; -- structure

Mon objectif est de vous aider à créer des produits de qualité, qui répondent à vos besoins et à ceux de vos utilisateurs."},{"label":"Peux-tu m''aider à apprendre à faire un site web?","content":"Je ne propose pas de cours pour le moment, mais je peux vous recommander des ressources et conseils pour vous orienter au mieux dans votre apprentissage."}]},{"title":"Tarification","questions":[{"label":"Combien coûte un projet?","content":"Le coût d''un projet dépend de nombreux facteurs, tels que la taille du projet, les fonctionnalités, le temps de développement, etc. Le montant initial de mes services web commence à 2000€, avec une moyenne comprise entre 3000€ et 10000€. Pour tout autre service de design ou de consulting, je facture généralement 450€ par jour."},{"label":"Comment fonctionne le paiement pour un projet?","content":"Je demande un acompte de 40% avant de commencer un projet, et les 60% restants après une livraison réussie. J''accepte les paiements par virement bancaire, PayPal, etc..."},{"label":"Combien de temps dure un projet?","content":"Il est difficile de donner une estimation précise, car chaque projet est différent, mais la majorité de mes travaux passés ont pris entre 2 semaines et 2 mois."},{"label":"Est-ce que je propose des réductions?","content":"J''offre une réduction de 15% pour les étudiants et les organisations à but non lucratif."}]},{"title":"Personnel","questions":[{"label":"Qu''est-ce que tu préfères dans ce travail?","content":"J''adore apprendre de nouvelles choses et pouvoir créer à peu près tout à partir de rien, créer de belles choses que les gens utiliseront et apprécieront."},{"label":"Des passions en dehors du travail?","content":"J''adore ce que je fais, donc je passe généralement beaucoup de temps à travailler sur des projets personnels, la photographie, etc. Je suis aussi un grand accro au sport.
